Divine Transcript Import Preview

This preview accepts plain-text transcripts from Divine Podcasts. Upload a .txt, .md, or .txt.md file (e.g. OpenWhispr exports) or paste the transcript directly. All draft choices are placeholders — expert review is required before saving. No audio transcription or Gemini is used.

Settings

Powers hints and auto-tagging. Your key is stored only in this browser — never synced to Drive, never committed, never sent anywhere except directly to Google's Gemini API.

Checking…

Stores tests and question images in your Google Drive. Works from any HTTPS origin or from localhost (Electron dev). To use Drive from a new static host, add its origin to DRIVE_EXTRA_ORIGINS in the source and register it in Google Cloud Console.

Drive not connected.

Require a 4-digit PIN when opening the app. PIN is stored locally and syncs via Google Drive.
